subject.optimization_goal: Add evidence-ranked next-work recommendations without broadening the trigger or adopting SkillOpt as a dependency.

baseline.summary: Baseline has selected-repo resolution, dynamic discovery, portable fallback, and follow-up rules, but it does not rank next actions by evidence level or require a realistic dry-run signal before recommendation wording.

candidate.summary: Candidate adds a recommendation ladder, evidence contract, realistic dry-run or real-use signal requirement, and rollback instructions.

validation_set.requirement: Preserve skill name and trigger discoverability.
validation_set.evidence: Baseline and candidate keep name manager-next-work-radar and a visible Trigger phrase.

validation_set.requirement: Preserve selected repo and portable fallback boundaries.
validation_set.evidence: Candidate keeps selected repo resolution, projectless guard, and skill-owned portable fallback wording.

validation_set.requirement: Prioritize unfinished manager-visible blockers and positive pilots before shiny new exploration.
validation_set.evidence: Candidate adds a Recommendation Ladder with rank labels including resume-blocked-high-value, finish-visible-incomplete, adopt-positive-pilot, refresh-evidence, and new-exploration.

validation_set.requirement: Require realistic dry-run or real-use evidence before manager-facing next-work recommendations.
validation_set.evidence: Candidate adds an Evidence Contract requiring generated selected-repo report, projectless fallback run, bounded RefreshEcosystem run, or linked issue/PR/check/comment gate.

validation_set.requirement: Fixture-only, static-only, list-only, or missing evidence must be labeled UNVERIFIED and cannot become adoption advice.
validation_set.evidence: Candidate preserves list-only UNVERIFIED wording and adds explicit static/fixture/list-only recommendation labeling.

validation_set.requirement: Preserve manager-only decision boundaries and external adoption guard.
validation_set.evidence: Candidate keeps manager-only decision list and the rule not to claim external tool adoption from radar output alone.

validation_set.requirement: Provide a rollback path for the accepted candidate.
validation_set.evidence: Candidate adds Rollback instructions pointing to rollback/SKILL.md and the harness plus radar tests.

rollback.strategy: Restore the rollback manager-next-work-radar SKILL.md if recommendation ranking becomes noisy or evidence labeling weakens.
steps: Copy examples/skillopt-medium-risk-rollout/manager-next-work-radar/rollback/SKILL.md over both Codex Desktop manager-next-work-radar SKILL.md targets.
Keep #907 open if realistic dry-run recommendation evidence regresses.

final_decision.reason: Candidate preserves selected-repo portability, ecosystem refresh boundaries, manager-only decision gates, and no external SkillOpt dependency while adding evidence-ranked recommendations, realistic dry-run requirements, and rollback proof.
